plugins.name: apm-authoring
plugins.description: Guidelines for authoring APM packages (instructions, skills, prompts, agents, hooks).

plugins.name: go-microservice-dev-kit
plugins.description: Umbrella package for Qubership Go microservices.

plugins.name: qubership-essentials
plugins.description: Umbrella package with the baseline agent setup for any Netcracker/Qubership repository: APM authoring, code review, English style, Markdown rules, workflow-hub usage, and skill telemetry.

plugins.name: qubership-global-essentials
plugins.description: Umbrella package with the Qubership agent setup that is useful in a global user workspace.

plugins.name: qubership-agent-support-pr
plugins.description: Prepare a repository PR that installs qubership-essentials and generated agent assets.

plugins.name: english-developer-style
plugins.description: Compatibility alias for the original package name; resolves to english-us-developer-style, so the bare name defaults to American English.

plugins.name: english-uk-developer-style
plugins.description: British-English-first style guidance for developer-facing text: docs, code comments, commit messages, UI strings, and English localisation files.

plugins.name: english-us-developer-style
plugins.description: American-English-first style guidance for developer-facing text: docs, code comments, commit messages, UI strings, and English localization files.

plugins.name: french-developer-style
plugins.description: French technical-prose conventions for developer-facing text; defaults to fr-FR, with an fr-CA mode.

plugins.name: russian-developer-style
plugins.description: Russian style guidance for developer-facing text: docs, code comments, commit messages, UI strings, and Russian localisation files.

plugins.name: markdown-line-length-120
plugins.description: Markdown drafting rules an autofixer cannot fix, for repositories pinning markdownlint MD013.line_length to 120.

plugins.name: triage-dependency-prs
plugins.description: Skill that triages failing checks on dependency-update PRs (Renovate and Dependabot) and drives them back to green.

plugins.name: enable-renovate-automerge
plugins.description: Skill that enables Renovate automerge on a repository behind a real test/style required check.

plugins.name: adr-authoring
plugins.description: Author Architecture Decision Records that follow the ADR contract used across Qubership repositories.

plugins.name: codex-review
plugins.description: Skill that runs a Codex CLI code review and applies the fixes, iterating until the review is clean.

plugins.name: adapt-nifi-flows-to-2-x
plugins.description: Apply NiFi 1.x to 2.x upgrade advisor recommendations to exported flow JSON files.

plugins.name: api-diff-authoring
plugins.description: Authoring classify rules, response-scope handling, adapters, and tests for the api-diff library.

plugins.name: api-unifier-authoring
plugins.description: Conventions for extending the api-unifier normalization engine (rules, unify functions, validators).

plugins.name: api-unifier-testing
plugins.description: Conventions for writing api-unifier tests across OpenAPI, AsyncAPI, JSON Schema, and GraphAPI.

plugins.name: dbaas-mounted-secret-migration
plugins.description: Migrate Go, Spring, and Quarkus DBaaS services from runtime REST provisioning to mounted database Secrets.

plugins.name: migrate-core-operator-dbaas-declarations
plugins.description: Convert legacy Core Operator DBaaS DatabaseDeclaration and DbPolicy manifests to dbaas-operator InternalDatabase and DatabaseAccessPolicy CRDs.

plugins.name: qubership-workflow-hub-usage
plugins.description: Skills for designing, writing, reviewing, and debugging GitHub Actions workflows that consume netcracker/qubership-workflow-hub actions and Netcracker/.github templates.

plugins.name: core-mesh-to-istio-migration
plugins.description: Orchestrates the full Cloud-Core Mesh to Istio migration end-to-end — converts declarative mesh CRs to Gateway API, migrates route-registration libraries, wires SERVICE_MESH_TYPE, generates HTTPRoutes from code, and maintains MIGRATION_LOG.md.

plugins.name: ai-agent-telemetry
plugins.description: Hooks that call the ai-agent-telemetry CLI after each skill invocation (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor).

plugins.name: ai-agent-telemetry-configure
plugins.description: Setup, repair, and verification skill for the ai-agent-telemetry CLI (endpoint, token, CA, selftest).
